title: Dopamine Detox
author: Thibaut Meurisse
subline: Reset your brain. Reclaim your focus.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A single phone screen, large, with a TIMER running down. The timer's digital readouts are ash digits; the final second is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Phone outline: a 540x900 rounded rectangle drawn as a sharp rect (no rounded) -->
    <rect x="-270" y="-450" width="540" height="900" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Top status bar -->
    <line x1="-270" y1="-400" x2="270" y2="-400" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="0" y="-415" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11
rationale: A phone screen with a 48:00:00 timer counting down. The final '00' (seconds) is RED — the moment your focus returns. 320px whisper title at the top — the device is the addiction.
